_comment: Runtime configuration for Air Twin. Environment-specific and operational parameters live here. Device-specific facts live in device_profiles.json. Asset-specific facts live in asset_registry.json.

room._volume_comment: Derived from Polycam LiDAR scan. Wide section: 3.20m x 7.46m x 2.57m = 61.4 m3. Narrow section: 1.60m x 4.49m x 2.57m = 18.5 m3. Total: 79.8 m3. Previous hand estimate was 69.6 m3.
room._shape_comment: L-shaped room. Well-mixed room assumption applies with reduced accuracy relative to a rectangular room of equal volume. Room efficiency factor in twin_state.json absorbs geometric inefficiency empirically.

baseline._min_readings_comment: 15 consecutive minutes at 1Hz = 900 readings. All must have plausibility_reason == ok before baseline lock is attempted.
baseline._variance_comment: Rolling std must remain below this value (ug/m3) during the learn window for the window to qualify as stable.
baseline._ema_comment: Exponential moving average learning rate for baseline_current. Slow â€” baseline_current is trend context only, not used for regime decisions.
baseline._roc_comment: If baseline_current rises faster than this rate sustained over the guard window, confidence takes a larger negative hit. Guards against gradual baseline drift being silently absorbed.

regimes._gap_comment: If no readings arrive for longer than this, twin enters unknown regime on next reading. Does not resume baseline from stale state.
regimes._degraded_entry_comment: Rolling mean must exceed baseline_locked + (N * baseline_std) to trigger degraded regime consideration.
regimes._degraded_duration_comment: Exceedance must be sustained for this many consecutive minutes before regime transitions to degraded.
regimes._degraded_exit_comment: Must return to baseline range for this many consecutive minutes before regime transitions back to baseline.

spikes._spike_comment: If a spike resolves within this window, it is logged as a spike event and regime stays baseline. If not resolved, escalates to degraded regime consideration.
spikes._policy_comment: Twin observes purifier auto response before intervening. Intervention threshold is learned from empirical spike observations, not fixed. Fixed values are cold-start priors only.
spikes._obs_comment: How long twin observes purifier auto response before evaluating whether to intervene. Gives auto mode time to demonstrate adequate decay. Twin does not command during this window.
spikes._learn_comment: Minimum spike episodes observed before learned threshold supersedes cold-start prior. During Phase A (< min observations) twin observes only. Phase B (>= min) enables evidence-based intervention.
spikes._prior_comment: Cold-start intervention threshold — used only until min_spike_observations_to_learn is reached. If observed decay rate during spike is below this fraction of expected, auto mode is deemed inadequate. Replaced by learned threshold once sufficient data exists.

spike_response_model._comment: Learned model of purifier adequate auto response. Built from empirical spike observations. Twin learns what adequate performance looks like per auto step and spike magnitude bracket. Intervention threshold derived from this model.
spike_response_model._brackets_comment: Spike magnitude brackets in µg/m³ above baseline. Twin tracks adequate response separately per bracket — a small spike requires different intervention logic than a large one.
spike_response_model._ratio_comment: Learned adequate performance ratio per auto step and magnitude bracket. Keyed by str(auto_step):str(bracket_index). Populated by twin engine as spike observations accumulate. Empty until min_spike_observations_to_learn reached.
spike_response_model._intervention_comment: Set to true automatically by twin engine when min_spike_observations_to_learn reached. Never set manually — twin earns intervention rights through observation.

confidence._smoothing_comment: Exponential smoothing learning rate for confidence score. Small â€” confidence changes should be evidence-driven and gradual, not reactive to single readings.

evidence_weights._comment: Signed evidence deltas applied per reading cycle. Positive increases confidence, negative decreases. Magnitudes are relative â€” tune based on observed behaviour.

confidence._cross_ref_comment: Threshold is intentionally generous — SDS011 and IKEA internal sensor are physically separated in the room. Disagreement below this threshold is expected at rest due to spatial variation, not sensor fault.

filter._unlogged_comment: If filter_age drops by more than this between consecutive readings, an unlogged filter change is suspected. Discriminated from communication fault using device_age continuity and performance ratio.

performance._perf_comment: Mirrors device_profiles.json. Performance ratio below this value triggers diagnostic decision tree. Kept here so it can be tuned per deployment without touching the device profile.
performance._event_comment: Minimum purifier response event duration before trend_slope is considered reliable enough to log as a performance_observation.

control._heartbeat_comment: Windows twin engine publishes heartbeat to Pi at this interval. Pi local fallback activates if heartbeat is absent beyond heartbeat_timeout_s.
control._autonomous_comment: Twin engine may autonomously increase fan speed during spike events. Sustained high-speed operation beyond escalation_awareness_minutes triggers operator awareness event.
control._auto_mode_comment: Twin engine switches purifier from auto to manual before commanding speed, restores auto when done. Logged but does not require explicit permission.
control._degraded_speed_comment: Fan speed commanded when twin intervenes during DEGRADED regime. Tunable without code changes.
control._restore_comment: When true, twin restores purifier to auto mode after every twin-commanded episode resolves. Auto mode is the default intelligence layer — twin supervises, not replaces.
